troubleshooting.state_name: 濾網堵塞（壓差持續上升）
troubleshooting.state_description: 漆渣累積導致濾網阻塞，壓差持續上升超過 0.30 bar

troubleshooting.state_name: 濾網堵塞（壓差持續上升）
troubleshooting.state_description: 漆渣累積導致濾網阻塞，壓差持續上升超過 0.30 bar
壓力波動超過 ±10%，影響塗料霧化品質
實際噴幅與目標值偏差超過 ±10mm
troubleshooting.countermeasure: 校正噴嘴與工件 TCP Z 軸距離

troubleshooting.state_description: 實際噴幅與目標值偏差超過 ±10mm
troubleshooting.countermeasure: 調整塗料流量與空壓比例

troubleshooting.state_name: 伺服馬達負載過高/磨損
troubleshooting.state_description: 減速機磨損導致伺服馬達電流與扭矩負載上升，長期超標將導致故障
troubleshooting.countermeasure: 定期潤滑伺服馬達與減速機

troubleshooting.state_name: 伺服馬達負載過高/磨損
troubleshooting.state_description: 減速機磨損導致伺服馬達電流與扭矩負載上升，長期超標將導致故障
troubleshooting.countermeasure: 更換伺服馬達或減速機總成

calculation_info.note: D-stage integration: TimeSeriesService calculates full component_metrics, evaluates EventRule thresholds, builds Monitoring payload, alert_event payload, batch_station_status payload, Future prediction payload, and Troubleshooting payload. Runtime files are demo JSON outputs; formal DB API can replace them later.

database_info.note: Only processed/calculated data is saved. Raw data is generated randomly in prototype mode and not saved again by this service.
